items.title: Iran retaliation raises questions about US air defences
items.dek: Iran's strike on US Navy base in Bahrain will worry Washington and its allies in the region.

items.title: How the world has reacted to US and Israeli strikes on Iran
items.dek: World leaders have been giving their responses to the attacks on several Iranian cities and Tehran's retaliation.
